title: rubia olivieri subvar. tenuifolia
intro: Rubia olivieri subvar. tenuifolia, also known as Himalayan madder or Chinese madder, is a subvariety of the Rubia plant species, primarily found in the Himalayan regions. This plant has been used for centuries due to its rich content of anthraquinone glycosides, which possess potent medicinal properties. The health benefits of Rubia olivieri subvar. tenuifolia include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as fever, wounds, and gastrointestinal issues. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal use, and is also used as a natural dye due to its vibrant red color.
